pull-request-header: **Merge this PR when you're ready to ship the latest changes.** Each package's section below shows the new version and changelog entries computed from Conventional Commits since the last release. Merging this PR triggers `npm publish --provenance` for any bumped npm package and attaches a fresh `.zip` to the `extension-v<version>` GitHub Release for any extension bump — full flow in [RELEASING.md](https://github.com/timothyjordan/a14y/blob/main/RELEASING.md). The PR body refreshes automatically on every push to `main`, so it always reflects what would ship if you merged right now.
pull-request-footer: _Need to republish a single package after an infra failure? Use the `Release` workflow's manual `workflow_dispatch` with the workspace path — see [RELEASING.md](https://github.com/timothyjordan/a14y/blob/main/RELEASING.md#escape-hatch-republish-one-package). Don't use that path for routine releases._
